entry.title: This Is What It Feels Like
entry.summary:
Author: wei_timo

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 29,394Chapters: 7/7Kudos: 1

Summary: "And I need you sometimesWe'll be alrightMet you at the right timeThis is what it feels like And I miss you some nightsWe'll be alrightMet you at the right timeThis is what it feels like"---------------------------------------------Eddie comes over to Buck's place for a few beers. What seems like a normal night like always quickly turns into something way more meaningful than they both could've ever imagined.

entry.title: Buck and Eddie vs the 118 betting pool
entry.summary:
Author: goldenbuck118

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 6,900Chapters: 5/?Kudos: 40

Summary: It starts as a joke… mostly.Hen puts 5 dollars in a cup and says buck and eddie will be together by christmas. Chim makes a spreadsheet before lunch, and bobby disapprovingly says “no not a chance this is inappropriate in the workplace” and then puts five on "before next summer” What follows is two years of painful pining near misses, incidents that should 100% count as dating, jealousy and a betting pool that could fund the next 4 118 family bbq’s and the best part buck and eddie are completely clueless that there's money involved and the entire rest of the 118 are absolutely losing their minds about when it's going to happen

entry.title: THE WEIGHT OF A FALSE NAME
entry.summary:
Author: A_rnie

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 6,336Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 7

Summary: The man dropped the wood with a sharp clatter. His eyes widened, shimmering with a sudden, wet brilliance."Beholder of my vow," he breathed.His voice was Eddie’s, but deeper, vibrating with a melodic resonance that seemed to echo in the small space."You are awake? The ancestors... they have returned you to me!"Buck opened his mouth to whisper "Eddie? Where am I?" but the man gave him no breath to speak.In two strides, the stranger was across the furs, his knees hitting the floor with a thud.He cupped Buck’s face in large, calloused hands—hands that felt familiar yet rougher, scarred by a life Buck didn't know. Then, he crushed their lips together.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: Drowning (in the loneliness)
entry.summary:
Author: Dolly_mae_17

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 8,212Chapters: 6/?Kudos: 209

Summary: The damn lawsuit If he could, he’d never in a million universes file that lawsuit. The lawsuit didn’t solve anything, actually it made things worse. He lost everybody. Even Maddie because she chose Chimney over him. Of course she would. Who in their right mind would choose him? No one. No one ever has. All he wanted was his family back. Why couldn't they see that? Now all he has is an empty apartment. An apartment that used to float with joy, laughter, love. Thinking of those memories actually put a smile on his face after the day he just had. They won't ever be like that again, because he ruined it just like he ruins everything. Why couldn’t he just wait it out? Just wait for Bobby to say he can come back? Instead he chose to sue the department, and Bobby.

entry.title: A Year In The Life
entry.summary:
Author: Luna_Fics

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 9,895Chapters: 7/365Kudos: 25

Summary: 365 Days. 365 Moments. One year to go from best friends to husbands. I'm tackling a 365 day challenge, bringing you a year in the life of Buddie! Every day gets a new chapter on the quiet everyday little moments that slowly shift their relationship and change absolutely everything. I’ve been working on this for ages and already have the first four months completely pre written, so you can expect super consistent daily updates. If I miss a day, I'll keep it going. It will not be abandoned. But I should hit the daily targets 🤞 Most of the story stays with Buck and Eddie, but we will get a few other characters witnessing things, and scenes between Buck and Eddie and other characters. . It's going to be a year of small moments between Buck and Eddie.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: I Can't Let You Go (The Ghosts That Haunt Us)
entry.summary:
Author: FantasyandFlowers

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 29,808Chapters: 14/14Kudos: 21

Summary: “He’s missing,” a cry burst from Eddie’s chest, loud and guttural. Eddie collapsed forward, sobbing into Buck’s shoulder. His hands gripped the back of Buck’s shirt, and Buck could feel his entire body heave up and down with every new wail. Tears of his own slid down Buck’s cheeks as he hugged his— as he hugged Eddie, tight. “We will find him,” Buck promised. Though he felt a cry of his own forming in his chest. The entire world had tilted on its axis. Christopher was missing. Their brilliant, beautiful, kind Christopher was missing. Who would want to hurt him? or After a particularly long shift at work, Buck and Eddie come home to find Christopher sick on the bathroom floor. They rush him to the Emergency Room, only for Chris to go missing and the entire ER department to gaslight them into believing he was never there.

entry.title: i'll put $100 on gay eddie diaz, please
entry.summary:
Author: likes_koolaid

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 3,091Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 116

Summary: “It’s past 10:30,” Adriana says, like that’s what he’s struggling to understand, the concept of time zones foreign to him. “That means you’re officially thirty-four.” “Yeah? Is that too old to be gay?” “Yes!” she shouts. “You were supposed to come out before you turned thirty-four. You cannot tell Sophia.” “Can’t tell Sophia what?” Sophia asks, appearing in the corner of the screen as a grainy pixel. or, Eddie Diaz is thirty-four and gay, and his sisters have a lot to say about that

entry.title: Borrowed space
entry.summary:
Author: Buddiemax

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 8,936Chapters: 4/?Kudos: 13

Summary: After a pipe bursts and floods his apartment, Buck shows up at Eddie’s late at night, needing a place to stay. While he’s welcomed into the warmth of Eddie and Christopher’s home, Buck can’t ignore the strange tension in his chest—something about being there feels both right and unsettling at the same time.

entry.title: What still might happen
entry.summary:
Author: amisguidedpoet

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 2,258Chapters: 2/?Kudos: 5

Summary: Buck was the closest thing to art Eddie had seen in years. Of course, Eddie didn’t know that at the time. Back then, Buck was just a stranger with golden hair in an empty gallery, talking about a photograph Eddie knew very well. But looking back now, after everything that happened, after everything Buck became, Eddie could see it clearly: Buck was color. And Eddie hadn’t seen much color in a long time. --- Eddie hasn’t painted since his wife died. Life’s been quieter since. Until he meets Buck, a student who seems to notice everything Eddie’s spent years trying not to. It doesn’t feel like anything at first. But then it does, and suddenly, he’s not sure he knows how to ignore it anymore.

  • Creator Chose Not To Use Archive Warnings

entry.title: But, You’re My Idiot
entry.summary:
Author: Writeninembers

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 35,708Chapters: 13/?Kudos: 105

Summary: It starts at the firefighter auction. With Buck on stage.With a smile Eddie can’t return.With a feeling he doesn’t understand—and refuses to name. Because it shouldn’t matter. It’s just Buck. Right? It would be easier if it was. Some lines don’t blur.Some lines were never even there. And some feelings? They don’t stay buried. No matter how hard they try.

entry.title: only fools are satisfied
entry.summary:
Author: windmillsofmymind

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 45,130Chapters: 4/4Kudos: 116

Summary: “I think maybe Pepa's setting you up with the wrong people,” Buck blurts out. “I did like him, he just–” “I mean–” Buck huffs, and then he really gets going, “he’s basically just some–some emotionally unavailable douche who dragged you all the way out to Studio City fully intending to ditch you until he realized he had a chance to get in your pants, which–where, in some restroom? And don’t even get me started on–like, you said you sucked his dick, but what about you? Did he even get you off? That doesn’t sound very considerate! Frankly, he sounds like a terrible guy, and you should let me set you up with someone!” Eddie’s brain isn’t going remotely as fast as Buck’s, because he’s still slowly making his way from his first thought (did I ever tell him I was meeting Matt in Studio City?) to his second one (has he been thinking about if and how I got off this whole time?) when Buck says that last part, and then it takes another moment to sink in. He blinks at the table. He blinks at Buck. “I’m sorry, what was that?”Or: Eddie comes out, Pepa takes the initiative, and Buck follows her lead.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: sudok-who? sudoku
entry.summary:
Author: simplyylupin

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 6,577Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 319

Summary: “I gotta go to work now, baby,” Buck says, craning his neck down like an emperor penguin looking at his chick. “Be good for Eddie, okay?” “Okay,” Theo garbles around his toothbrush. He wiggles out between Buck’s legs and scampers over to Eddie, fingers reaching up to claw at his jeans pocket. “Can we go to the park?” He blinks up at Eddie with those wide, pleading baby blue eyes. God, he remembers the first time Theo whipped those out on him; remembers thinking I’m screwed. There’s two of them now. Picking him up under his armpits, Eddie swings Theo easily up and onto his hip. He extracts the toothbrush from Theo’s mouth and bops him lightly on his nose with the flat end of it.

entry.title: Picture imperfect
entry.summary:
Author: Graceful_Ashes

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 2,414Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 71

Summary: Pulling apart, Buck and Eddie turn to look down at the broken picture frame. A photo of Buck, Eddie and Chris lays morosely within the wreckage. "Uh, we should probably clean that up." Buck says hoarsely. "Yeah." Eddie agrees with a sigh and turns to look back at Buck. The sight of him has Eddie's breath catching, as he takes in Buck's flushed face, the sheen of saliva on his lips and his dark, hooded eyes. The heat momentarily extinguished by the picture frame flares back to life with a vengeance. "But it can wait until later." OR Buck and Eddie come home from a date and can't keep their hands to themselves.

entry.title: That Boy Is 𝓜𝓘𝓝𝓔
entry.summary:
Author: KiaLecterGraham

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 25,771Chapters: 21/?Kudos: 522

Summary: Evan "Buck" Buckley had a normal life. A normal boyfriend (too normal), a normal job, normal parents (whom he hates), and a sister he loves. His whole life seemed normal until he met Eddie Diaz, bringing his son Christopher to the school where Buck works. When their eyes met, Buck knew that Eddie would be his alone. So, Buck started to stalk him without knowing that Eddie wanted him too. OR A story where Buck stalks Eddie Diaz, thinking that he is just a single father with an adorable son whom Buck wants as his own. Not knowing that Eddie is a mafia boss and wants Buck as his spouse and mother of his mijo.
